strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across Node.js/TypeScript and React
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Strong testing/TDD background with workshops on Selenium, TDD, and a D test runner
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is dated (robotic arms work pre-2018)
Vitest not explicitly cited; testing experience leans on Jest/Selenium/custom D tooling

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and Kotlin in stated stack

response.justification: The candidate exceeds the 6+ year bar with ~14 years of full-stack work, demonstrating TypeScript/Node.js (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq) and React (Optilyz) plus MongoDB and AWS CDK — directly matching the primary stack and database/cloud requirements. The current re:cinq role explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, satisfying the AI agent development requirement, which is rare. Git, Docker, Kubernetes (GISCollective), and security-conscious work at RIDE (investment platform) cover the remaining infra/security asks. Gaps: Nest.js is not named, Kotlin is absent, and Vitest is not explicitly cited (though Jest-equivalent testing maturity is evident via TDD practice and authoring a D test runner). On balance the evidence strongly supports fit, with framework-specific gaps being learnable for a senior engineer.
